% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for ml_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u39,axiom,
    supervised = sK0).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    reinforcement != sK0).

cnf(u46,axiom,
    unsupervised != sK0).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ml_algorithm(reinforcement)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~trains(unsupervised,summarization_model)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    supervised != unsupervised).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~requires_labeled_data(unsupervised)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    supervised != reinforcement).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~ml_algorithm(X0) | unsupervised = X0 | reinforcement = X0 | supervised = X0).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ml_algorithm(sK0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    trains(sK0,summarization_model)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ml_algorithm(unsupervised)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ml_algorithm(supervised)).

cnf(u65,axiom,
    trains(supervised,summarization_model)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~trains(X0,summarization_model) | requires_labeled_data(X0)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~trains(reinforcement,summarization_model)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    unsupervised != reinforcement).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    requires_labeled_data(sK0)).

cnf(u64,axiom,
    requires_labeled_data(supervised)).

% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for ml_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for ml_neg.tptp
6. ~requires_labeled_data(unsupervised) [input(axiom)]
9. ! [X0] : (trains(X0,summarization_model) => requires_labeled_data(X0)) [input(axiom)]
10. ~trains(unsupervised,summarization_model) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~~trains(unsupervised,summarization_model) [negated conjecture 10]
12. trains(unsupervised,summarization_model) [flattening 11]
15. ! [X0] : (requires_labeled_data(X0) | ~trains(X0,summarization_model)) [ennf transformation 9]
25. ~requires_labeled_data(unsupervised) [cnf transformation 6]
29. ~trains(X0,summarization_model) | requires_labeled_data(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
30. trains(unsupervised,summarization_model) [cnf transformation 12]
31. requires_labeled_data(unsupervised) [resolution 29,30]
33. $false [forward subsumption resolution 31,25]
% SZS output end Proof for ml_neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
